name: Tasks Phase Planner Skill Discovery
feature_requirements: Generate and execute a Tasks-phase DAG for auth-header using the Subagent Planner with skill discovery.

feature_requirements.spec: Vaulted at .specs/features/auth-header/spec.md — create src/services/auth_service.js with SecurityHeaderRule per custom-security-linter skill.
feature_requirements.design: Vaulted at .specs/features/auth-header/design.md — single file, no ADRs.
feature_requirements.skill: Project skill custom-security-linter is at .dag-flow/skills/custom-security-linter/SKILL.md. Planner must search_skills and read_skill before generating the DAG.
feature_requirements.execution: After vaulting the DAG, provide run_dag.sh and wait for execution status.

user_context.answering_style: Direct and concise. Confirm Tasks phase when asked; approve proceeding to DAG generation.

dag_flow_prompt: Implement the auth-header feature. Specification and design are already vaulted at .specs/features/auth-header/. Enter the Tasks phase, use the Subagent Planner to generate the JSON DAG, vault it, then guide execution.
